findings.name: Missing Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: The response is missing the content-security-policy header.
findings.remediation: Add a Content-Security-Policy that restricts script/style/object sources.

findings.name: Missing X-Content-Type-Options
findings.description: The response is missing the x-content-type-options header.
findings.remediation: Set 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to stop MIME sniffing.

findings.name: Missing X-Frame-Options / frame-ancestors
findings.description: The response is missing the x-frame-options header.
findings.remediation: Set X-Frame-Options: DENY or a CSP frame-ancestors directive to prevent clickjacking.

findings.name: Missing Referrer-Policy
findings.description: The response is missing the referrer-policy header.
findings.remediation: Set a Referrer-Policy such as 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin'.

findings.name: Reflected XSS in parameter 'q'
findings.description: User input is reflected into the response without output encoding.
findings.remediation: Context-aware output encoding; apply a strict Content-Security-Policy.

findings.remediation: Add a Content-Security-Policy that restricts script/style/object sources.

findings.remediation: Set a Referrer-Policy such as 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin'.

findings.name: SQL injection (error-based) in parameter 'id'
findings.evidence: SQL syntax; check the manual that corresponds to your MySQL
findings.description: Appending a quote triggers a database error, indicating unsanitized SQL.
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements; never concatenate input into SQL.

findings.name: Cookie 'SESSIONID' missing HttpOnly, SameSite
findings.description: Set-Cookie for 'SESSIONID' lacks: HttpOnly, SameSite.
findings.remediation: Set HttpOnly, Secure (on HTTPS) and SameSite on session cookies.

findings.name: Open redirect via parameter 'url'
findings.description: The app redirects to an attacker-controlled external URL.
findings.remediation: Allow-list redirect targets or use relative paths only.

findings.name: Path traversal via parameter 'file'
findings.description: A file path parameter allows reading arbitrary files via '../' sequences.
findings.remediation: Canonicalize and validate paths against an allow-list; never use raw input in file paths.

findings.name: Missing Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: The response is missing the content-security-policy header.
findings.remediation: Add a Content-Security-Policy that restricts script/style/object sources.

findings.name: Missing X-Content-Type-Options
findings.description: The response is missing the x-content-type-options header.
findings.remediation: Set 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to stop MIME sniffing.

findings.name: Missing X-Frame-Options / frame-ancestors
findings.description: The response is missing the x-frame-options header.
findings.remediation: Set X-Frame-Options: DENY or a CSP frame-ancestors directive to prevent clickjacking.

findings.name: Missing Referrer-Policy
findings.description: The response is missing the referrer-policy header.
findings.remediation: Set a Referrer-Policy such as 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin'.

findings.name: CORS allows any origin with credentials
findings.description: A wildcard ACAO combined with credentials lets any site read authenticated responses.
findings.remediation: Reflect only an explicit allow-list of trusted origins when credentials are used.

findings.name: Version disclosure in 'server' header
findings.description: Server/framework version is exposed, aiding targeted attacks.
findings.remediation: Suppress or genericize Server/X-Powered-By headers.

findings.name: Version disclosure in 'x-powered-by' header
findings.description: Server/framework version is exposed, aiding targeted attacks.
findings.remediation: Suppress or genericize Server/X-Powered-By headers.
